message:
style(config): drop unused `r#""#` raw-string hashes in allowlist test

The `auto_prune_expired` parser test used `r#"..."#` even though the
TOML body has no `"` characters that would require the hash delimiter,
so clippy's `needless_raw_string_hashes` was flagging it. Switch to a
plain `r"..."` literal — the body is byte-for-byte unchanged, just
the delimiter changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
